debug_info.goal:
a : Type
inst✝⁷ : Inhabited a
inst✝⁶ : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 = x2
inst✝⁵ : Max a
inst✝⁴ : Min a
inst✝³ : LT a
inst✝² : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 < x2
inst✝¹ : LE a
inst✝ : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 ≤ x2
k : ℕ
xs : List a
ok : k ≤ xs.length
us vs ws : List a
m : ℕ := us.length
n : ℕ := vs.length
h₁ : k ≤ m
⊢ k ≤ us.length

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa [h₂] using h₃
      exact h₄
    ) else
      if       h₂ : k ≤ m + n then select (k - m) vs (by
        have h₃ : k ≤ m + n := h₂
        have h₄ : k - m ≤ n := by
          have h₅ : k - m ≤ n := by
            omega
          exact h₅
        have h₅ : m + n = us.length + vs.length := by
          simp [m, n]
          <;> rfl
        have h₆ : k - m ≤ vs.length := by
          have h₇ : k - m ≤ n := h₄
          simp [n] at h₇ ⊢
          <;> omega
        exact h₆
      ) else select (k - m - n) ws (by
        have h₃ : ¬k ≤ m + n := h₂
        have h₄ : m + n < k := by
          omega
        have h₅ : k - m - n ≤ ws.length := by
          have h₆ : m + n < k := h₄
          have h₇ : (partition3 (pivot xs) xs).1.length + (partition3 (pivot xs) xs).2.1.length + (partition3 (pivot xs) xs).2.2.length = xs.length := by
            simp [partition3]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [List.length_append, List.length_map, List.length_filter]
